Interface IRelationshipRule

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply information about, modify and manage relationship rules.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("EB3B2F82-7E5C-11D2-AAB5-00C04FA37B82")]
public interface IRelationshipRule : IRule
